title: Stop Prompting Claude. Use Karpathy's Method Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese presents Andrej Karpathy's method for using Claude more effectively, structured as three layers designed to accelerate development velocity. The approach contrasts with typical prompting patterns and emphasizes a systematic methodology that unlocks Claude's potential.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through Andrej Karpathy's method for working with Claude, organized as three layers aimed at increasing development velocity. The method departs from typical prompting patterns in favor of a systematic approach to AI-assisted development. The takeaway is the three-layer structure itself, framed as a way to get more out of Claude than ad hoc prompting allows.
